# IVCAP Documentation

> IVCAP — a managed, provenance-aware platform for running, building, and orchestrating analytic services and AI agents.

IVCAP is a managed, provenance-aware platform for running, building, and orchestrating analytic services and AI agents. It exposes a REST API and CLI for submitting jobs, managing artifacts, querying provenance via the Data Fabric, and building multi-agent pipelines.

## Concepts

- [How IVCAP Works](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/index.md)
- [Agentic Patterns](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/agentic-patterns/index.md)
- [Artifacts](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/artifacts/index.md)
- [Aspects and Provenance](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/aspects-and-provenance/index.md)
- [The Data Fabric](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/data-fabric/index.md)
- [Queues](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/queues/index.md)
- [Services and Jobs](https://docs.ivcap.net/concepts/services-and-jobs/index.md)
